pull.title: doc: Fix broken links in dev notes, move sections
pull.body:
The anchors in isocpp links were recently broken, so fix them to point to the correct anchor.

Also, move/regroup 3 sections while touching the file.

events.body: The following sections might be updated with supplementary metadata relevant to reviewers and maintainers. ### Code Coverage & Benchmarks For details see: https://corecheck.dev/bitcoin/bitcoin/pulls/35296. ### Reviews See [the guideline](https://github.com/bitcoin/bitcoin/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md#code-review) for information on the review process. | Type | Reviewers | | ---- | --------- | | ACK | [fanquake](https://github.com/bitcoin/bitcoin/pull/35296#issuecomment-4543097661) | | Stale ACK | [janb84](https://github.com/bitcoin/bitcoin/pull/35296#pullrequestreview-4298321754) | If your review is incorrectly listed, please copy-paste <!--meta-tag:bot-skip--> into the comment that the bot should ignore. ### Conflicts Reviewers, this pull request conflicts with the following ones: * [#35260](https://github.com/bitcoin/bitcoin/pull/35260) (doc: clarify test placement guidance by l0rinc) If you consider this pull request important, please also help to review the conflicting pull requests. Ideally, start with the one that should be merged first.

ACK fab42cf626d1fe28f43054e3ea15c35784d5b94f

I have validated that the fixed links indeed work (on both safari and chromium). 
Also validated that there aren't any leftover broken links in the doc, regarding C++ core guidelines.
The reordering of the document seems logical to me, LGTM.

doc: Regroup clang-tidy rules

* Remove the explicit modernize-use-nullptr rule mention, which has not been needed for years.
* Encourage devs to refer to the upstream clang-tidy rules documentation.
* Move NOLINTNEXTLINE(misc-no-recursion) into a subsection under the new clang-tidy section.

events.message:

* Remove the explicit modernize-use-nullptr rule mention, which has not been needed for years.

* Move NOLINTNEXTLINE(misc-no-recursion) into a subsection under the new clang-tidy section.
